title: Brown floppy-ear dog plush
description: Large floppy brown cream dog — cleaning and refresh and sewing and fabric repair.
itemDetails: Brown and cream floppy-eared dog plush (lying pose). Shaggy medium-brown pile on body, head, and long ears; smoother tan/cream velour-style muzzle, forehead patch, and paw tips; dark brown fabric nose; small black bead eyes. No visible brand tag or label in hero image—likely generic retail/gift plush (1990s–2000s styles similar to Russ, Aurora, or department-store lines). Non-electronic; fabric and stuffing only. Market: everyday plush; identify maker from tush tag if found during repair.
repairDetails: Fluffy dog toy repair (legacy site gallery — short caption only; expand story when details are available).
